DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS MOOT AS THE COURT HAS FOUND THAT THERE IS NO LIKELIHOOD THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PARTICIPATE INS DISCOVERY. THERE ARE NO NEW FACTS OR LAW THAT THE COURT HAS NOT CONSIDERED IN MAKING THAT FINDING AND IN ORDERING TERMINATION SANCTIONS. AS THE MOTION SEEKS RECONSIDERATION OF THE ORDER TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION, THAT RECONSIDERATION IS MOOT AS THE COURT HAS GRANTED A MOTION SEEKING TERMINATING SANCTIONS. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
